tasks.title: Set up project structure
tasks.description: Initialize the repository, configure linting, and define the folder layout for the project.

tasks.title: Design system tokens
tasks.description: Set up color palette, typography, and spacing scales for the design system.

tasks.title: Authentication flow
tasks.description: Implement login, signup, and password reset screens with proper validation.

tasks.title: File upload component
tasks.description: Drag and drop file upload with preview, progress indicator, and error states.

tasks.title: Dark mode support
tasks.description: Add theme toggle and CSS variable switching across the entire application.

tasks.title: Dashboard layout
tasks.description: Build responsive sidebar and main content area with collapsible navigation.

tasks.title: API integration
tasks.description: Connect frontend to REST API endpoints with proper error handling and loading states.

tasks.title: Unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for utility functions, hooks, and critical UI components.

tasks.title: Performance audit
tasks.description: Run Lighthouse scores, identify bundle size issues, and optimize critical path.

tasks.title: Notification system
tasks.description: Toast notifications and in-app alerts with support for success, warning, and error types.

tasks.title: User settings page
tasks.description: Profile editing, preferences, and account management with avatar upload support.

tasks.title: E2E testing setup
tasks.description: Configure Playwright or Cypress for end-to-end testing of critical user journeys.
